entities.name: matplotlib
entities.context: Python plotting library used for generating health trend visualizations (plt.figure, plt.plot, plt.savefig)

entities.name: sqlite3
entities.context: Python database module used as the data source for health rows (sqlite3.Row type hints)

entities.name: pathlib.Path
entities.context: File path abstraction used for output directory and file path management

entities.name: Resting Heart Rate Trend
entities.context: Health metric tracked over ~60 days, plotted as BPM over time with plot_resting_hr_trend

entities.name: Rolling 7-Day Activity Minutes
entities.context: Activity metric visualized as a rolling 7-day window graph (rolling_7d_minutes.png)

entities.name: Sleep Score
entities.context: Sleep quality metric extracted from sleep_rows and plotted as a trend

entities.name: Minutes Asleep
entities.context: Raw sleep duration metric extracted alongside sleep score from sleep data

entities.name: Health Visualization Pipeline
entities.context: Python pipeline that reads health data from SQLite and generates PNG trend charts for HR, sleep, and activity

relationships.context: All plot functions use matplotlib for chart generation and PNG export
Health data rows are typed as sqlite3.Row, indicating SQLite as the data store
Output paths for generated PNGs managed via pathlib
One of the core metrics visualized by the pipeline
Activity metric visualized as rolling window chart
Sleep quality metric plotted as trend by plot_sleep_trends
Both extracted from the same sleep_rows data and plotted together
